entries.heading: Modular Consoles – Migration Required
entries.short_description: The original Modular Consoles mod is broken. Migrate to the maintained community version.
entries.long_description:
The original author is unavailable and the mod is broken on current game versions (especially the beta branch).

This will add the Manifest repo and install the replacement [b]modularconsoles[/b] version.

[u]LibConstruct[/u] is also required for full functionality.

Example [i]italic[/i] text, [strike]strikethrough[/strike], and a [url=https://github.com/StationeersCommunityMods/Manifest]link[/url].

[code]Some code example here[/code]

[h1]Header 1 example[/h1]

More text after paragraph break.

entries.heading: LibConstruct – Migration Required
entries.short_description: LibConstruct (companion to Modular Consoles) is broken. Migrate to the maintained version.
entries.long_description:
Companion library that is also broken on current versions.

This will install the repo version from the same Manifest repo.

Formatting examples:

[b]Bold text[/b]
[i]Italic text[/i]
[u]Underlined[/u]
[strike]Strikethrough[/strike]
